title: Quarter Volume Library Prep Step 7: PCR Enrichment
author: Opentrons

steps.title: Before running this protocol with custom...
steps.instruction: Before running this protocol with custom labware on the magnetic module, an engage height for this labware must be entered as a parameter value below.

steps.title: Before running this protocol, use settings...
steps.instruction: Before running this protocol, use settings in the OT app to pre-cool the temperature module to 4 degrees C.

steps.title: The protocol will alert the user...
steps.instruction: The protocol will alert the user to ensure reagents are present on deck in sufficient volume.

steps.title: The p20 multi will use 1...
steps.instruction: The p20 multi will use 1 tip on the rear-most channel to deliver i7 indexes from the specified row to columns of the PCR plate.

steps.title: The p300 multi will use 1...
steps.instruction: The p300 multi will use 1 tip on the rear-most channel to deliver Q5 Mastermix to the 6th column of the reagent plate.

steps.title: The p20 multi will transfer Q5...
steps.instruction: The p20 multi will transfer Q5 Mastermix from the reagent plate (column 6) to columns of the PCR plate.

steps.title: The p20 multi will transfer i5...
steps.instruction: The p20 multi will transfer i5 indexes from the specified column to columns of the PCR plate.

steps.title: The p20 multi will transfer eluted...
steps.instruction: The p20 multi will transfer eluted sample from columns of the magnetic module plate to columns of the PCR plate.
